pi_items.source: Task parameter for MIP slab thickness. Verified from DICOM file analysis: slice spacing = 2.0 mm, therefore 15 slices = 30.0 mm slab thickness
Verified from DICOM header inspection. Downloaded 0051.zip from https://github.com/invesalius/invesalius3/releases/download/v3.0/0051.zip. All DICOM files have Columns=512
Verified from DICOM header inspection. Downloaded 0051.zip from https://github.com/invesalius/invesalius3/releases/download/v3.0/0051.zip. All DICOM files have Rows=512
Verified from archive extraction and DICOM file analysis. Archive contains directory '0051' with 108 DICOM files. Patient Name in DICOM header: 'CT 0051 - InVesalius Sample'

privileged_info_summary: The CT Cranium dataset (case ID: CT 0051 - InVesalius Sample) contains 108 DICOM slices with dimensions of 512×512 pixels and slice spacing of 2.0 mm. The task requires configuring InVesalius with a Maximum Intensity Projection (MIP) mode using at least 15 slices (30 mm slab), and exporting the Axial view as a PNG image to /home/ga/Documents/axial_mip.png. The data is publicly available from the official InVesalius v3.0 release.
